Previous Season Next Season

Record: 23-10 (15-3, 1st in A-10 MBB)

Coach: Drew Valentine

PS/G: 73.1 (192nd of 362)

PA/G: 67.5 (58th of 362)

SRS: 6.57 (95th of 362)

SOS: 2.42 (109th of 362)

ORtg: 104.7 (215th of 362)
